value.found_quote: | Cost tracking       | Spend limits, rate limits, and usage attribution     | Anthropic only | [Costs](/en/costs)                       |
value.rationale: The page lists "Cost tracking" as a usage visibility capability for Claude Code, describing spend limits, rate limits, and usage attribution, available for Anthropic-provider deployments. This substantiates the claim that Anthropic offers cost tracking for monitoring spend. The page also references token monitoring via OpenTelemetry export of sessions and tokens, and a usage dashboard. The page presents these as currently available features with no indication of deprecation.
